startggClientId.description: Client ID of your own start.gg OAuth app. If present alongside startggClientSecret, activates dev mode (direct exchange, no proxy).

startggClientSecret.description: Client Secret of your own start.gg OAuth app.

challongeClientId.description: Client ID of your own Challonge OAuth app. If present alongside challongeClientSecret, activates dev mode.

challongeClientSecret.description: Client Secret of your own Challonge OAuth app.

packsRepoBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the packs repository.

packsRepoOwner.description: Owner or organization of the packs repository.

packsRepoBranch.description: Branch of the packs repository to download assets from.
